# MDE 1.3.9

## Features

- Added an editor `/` command for inserting links from a Notion-style picker.
- Added VS Code-like Markdown path suggestions that match slash-separated query parts and insert relative links.
- Added a new-document link flow that creates an empty Markdown file in the chosen workspace directory and inserts the new relative link.
- Added editor link routing:
  - Same-workspace Markdown links open in the current window.
  - Markdown links under remembered workspaces open that workspace and file in a new window.
  - HTTP and HTTPS links open in the system browser.

## Bug Fixes

- Disabled unsafe `javascript:` link hrefs at the editor boundary.
- Prevented BlockNote default link clicks from bypassing MDE workspace routing.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added pure editor-link routing helpers and unit coverage.
- Added IPC coverage for external links and workspace-file launches.
- Added E2E coverage for the slash-command link picker.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon DMG and ZIP
- macOS Intel DMG and ZIP
- Windows x64 NSIS installer
